CVE-2026-34352.title: In TigerVNC before 1.16.2, Image.cxx in x0vncserver allows other  ...
CVE-2026-34352.description: In TigerVNC before 1.16.2, Image.cxx in x0vncserver allows other users to observe or manipulate the screen contents, or cause an application crash, because of incorrect permissions.
